name: onemillion-github-hero
description: Remotion composition for teach-one-million GitHub README hero

scripts.build: remotion render src/index.ts GitHubHero out/hero.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 16
scripts.build:gif: npm run build && rm -rf out/frames && mkdir -p out/frames && ffmpeg -y -i out/hero.mp4 -vf 'fps=18,scale=960:-1:flags=lanczos' out/frames/%04d.png && gifski out/frames/*.png -o ../onemillion-builder/diagrams/hero-animated.gif --width 960 --fps 18 --quality 80 && echo 'Done: diagrams/hero-animated.gif'
